summary: Iteration 168 - Legislation Framework No-NSW-Fallback Verification Complete. All 93 pytest tests passed. Backend API tests confirm WA/QLD/empty state queries return correct state-specific legislation without NSW defaults. Frontend Legal tab correctly shows Western Australia legislation for WA case (R v JE) with state selector value 'wa' and no NSW Crimes Act contamination.
critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND: get_offence_category_details() in utilities.py correctly uses state parameter without NSW default (line 59: state: str = '')
BACKEND: get_offence_system_prompt() in offence_helpers.py correctly handles empty state by flagging 'Jurisdiction has not been confirmed'
BACKEND: get_export_legal_refs() returns 'Unspecified' for empty state, not NSW
BACKEND: All 12 anti-fallback tests in TestNoNSWFallbacks class pass
FRONTEND: LegalFrameworkViewer.jsx line 25 correctly defaults state to '' (empty string), not 'nsw'
FRONTEND: LegalFrameworkViewer.jsx line 114 shows 'Unspecified' for empty state, not 'NSW'
FRONTEND: CaseDetail.jsx line 1423 passes state={caseData?.state} to LegalFrameworkViewer
FRONTEND: State selector correctly shows 'Western Australia (WA)' for WA case
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 168 verified the no-NSW-fallback fix. Key verifications: (1) Backend API /api/offence-framework/{category}?state=wa returns WA legislation, (2) Backend API /api/offence-framework/{category}?state= (empty) returns 'Unspecified' state info, (3) Frontend LegalFrameworkViewer correctly uses case state (WA) and shows 'Western Australia Legislation' section with WA-specific Acts (Restraining Orders Act 1997 (WA), Family Violence Legislation Reform Act 2024 (WA)), (4) No NSW Crimes Act contamination in WA case Legal tab. All 93 pytest tests pass including 12 anti-fallback tests.

backend_api_wa_state.details: GET /api/offence-framework/domestic_violence?state=wa returns Western Australia (WA) with WA legislation

backend_api_empty_state.details: GET /api/offence-framework/assault?state= returns Unspecified (N/A) with no NSW default

backend_api_qld_state.details: GET /api/offence-framework/homicide?state=qld returns Queensland (QLD) with QLD legislation

backend_pytest_all_93_tests.details: All 93 tests in test_legislation_framework.py pass including 12 anti-fallback tests

frontend_legal_tab_wa_case.details: Legal tab for WA case (R v JE) shows state selector value 'wa', text 'Western Australia (WA)', and WA legislation

frontend_no_nsw_contamination.details: No 'Crimes Act 1900 (NSW)' found in WA case Legal tab
